command:
set -euo pipefail
mkdir -p /srv/alfafaa-knowledge-hub/packages
mkdir -p /srv/alfafaa-knowledge-hub
rm -rf /srv/alfafaa-knowledge-hub/internal-site/incoming
mkdir -p /srv/alfafaa-knowledge-hub/internal-site/incoming
tar -xzf /srv/alfafaa-knowledge-hub/packages/internal-site.tar.gz -C /srv/alfafaa-knowledge-hub/internal-site/incoming
if [ -d /srv/alfafaa-knowledge-hub/internal-site/current ]; then rm -rf /srv/alfafaa-knowledge-hub/internal-site/current-previous; mv /srv/alfafaa-knowledge-hub/internal-site/current /srv/alfafaa-knowledge-hub/internal-site/current-previous; fi
mkdir -p /srv/alfafaa-knowledge-hub/internal-site
mv /srv/alfafaa-knowledge-hub/internal-site/incoming /srv/alfafaa-knowledge-hub/internal-site/current
rm -rf /srv/alfafaa-knowledge-hub/engineering-site/incoming
mkdir -p /srv/alfafaa-knowledge-hub/engineering-site/incoming
tar -xzf /srv/alfafaa-knowledge-hub/packages/engineering-site.tar.gz -C /srv/alfafaa-knowledge-hub/engineering-site/incoming
if [ -d /srv/alfafaa-knowledge-hub/engineering-site/current ]; then rm -rf /srv/alfafaa-knowledge-hub/engineering-site/current-previous; mv /srv/alfafaa-knowledge-hub/engineering-site/current /srv/alfafaa-knowledge-hub/engineering-site/current-previous; fi
mkdir -p /srv/alfafaa-knowledge-hub/engineering-site
mv /srv/alfafaa-knowledge-hub/engineering-site/incoming /srv/alfafaa-knowledge-hub/engineering-site/current
